meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Beginner Checklist)
content.seo_description: Bridge the SaaS knowledge gap with this expert-led Claude Code skills setup. Follow our beginner checklist to ship professional apps faster with AI.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of SaaS knowledge requires shifting from manual coding to AI-assisted architectural orchestration. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a senior engineering partner, allowing you to generate robust, production-ready codebases rapidly while maintaining high standards of software architecture and security.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that clients don't pay for your 'learning journey'—they pay for finished, functional SaaS products. When you lack deep architectural knowledge, every feature request feels like a looming deadline you might miss. The pressure to ship while simultaneously learning backend infrastructure is the primary barrier to scaling your freelance business.

But the game has changed. By treating your terminal as a collaborative workspace with Claude Code and Antigravity, you effectively 'outsource' the architectural heavy lifting to an AI that never sleeps. This isn't just about writing code; it's about mastering the workflow of an AI-augmented developer to deliver enterprise-grade value at a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Environment Harmonization
steps.description: Establish a clean baseline for your project to ensure Claude Code has full context of your folder structure and dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and create a standard SaaS boilerplate using Next.js and Supabase, adhering to clean architecture principles.

steps.title: Database Schema Modeling
steps.description: Define your data entities clearly so the AI can handle relational logic without introducing technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a SaaS user management system including subscriptions, teams, and role-based access control.

steps.title: API Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure, type-safe API routes that follow RESTful conventions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure API endpoints for user authentication and billing webhooks based on the previously defined schema.

steps.title: Component Logic Injection
steps.description: Build UI components that interact seamlessly with your backend by leveraging AI-driven prop-drilling prevention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable dashboard component that fetches data from the user profile endpoint and handles loading and error states.

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure automated testing and deployment workflows to ensure your client's SaaS is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a CI/CD pipeline configuration for Vercel that includes environment variable validation and automated test runs.

pro_tips: Always define a 'System Persona' in your Claude configuration to force it to act as a Senior Staff Engineer rather than a junior coder.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Decision Logs' for every major feature to document your architectural choices for client transparency.
Prioritize 'Type-Safety First' by forcing Claude Code to generate TypeScript interfaces before writing any functional logic.
Implement 'Small-Batch Commits' by asking Claude to review code snippets every 50 lines to prevent hallucination drift.
Leverage the 'Explain' flag in Claude Code to force the AI to document its logic within the code comments for easier future maintenance.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by building a single 'Golden Path' feature—like user authentication—to test your integration before expanding to complex business logic.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to outpace your competition and deliver professional-grade software without the years of struggle. Stop guessing and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
